title: Software Developer Embedded Systems (M/F/D)*
description:
In this position, you will strengthen our product development team in the field of embedded software and have the opportunity to incorporate your know-how into the next innovative product generation.

With your attention to detail, your expertise in embedded software and your passion for product development, you will ensure the further development of our existing product portfolio and make a significant contribution to the company's success.

What you'll be handling:

- Design, implementation & further development of complex software solutions on embedded Linux platforms – embedded in a modern tech stack (VS Code, Git, Docker, REST)
- Design, development and execution of comprehensive (automated) tests (unit tests, integration tests) including well-founded analysis and interpretation of the results
- Derivation of optimization potentials and development of sustainable technical solution concepts
- Active participation and technical co-creation in agile product development projects with a focus on embedded systems

What you'll need:

- Completed training in the field of computer science, software design, mechatronics, automation technology or similar
- Professional experience in the embedded software environment
- Very good, field-tested knowledge of C++, Python, Bash
- Ideally, in-depth knowledge of Golang, Rust as well as experience in the field of network security, SSL/TLS
- Good written and spoken German and English skills (at least C1 level in each case)
- Analytical thinking, structured and independent way of working

What you'll receive:

- Participation in an agile development team, latitude, clear objectives and regular feedback
- Good transport connections, free parking, shuttle service to the train station and between TGW locations, e-bikes, etc.
- An appreciative working environment, motivated team and an open feedback culture
- Working with high-quality IT equipment and the latest technologies

We offer an attractive salary in line with the market, which can be above the collective agreement depending on qualifications and experience. The minimum gross basic salary based on full-time employment per year is 54.507 Euro.

*TGW is an employer that promotes equal opportunities. We invite everybody interested in this job to apply.
